title: Fix compat create with NetworkMode=default
body:
The rework of namespace handling for rootless CNI broke this, as CNI networks were being computed incorrectly. Fix handling of CNI networks for the Compat Create REST API for containers, and add a test so we don't regress again.

Fixes #10569

comments.body: Should be good to merge. @containers/podman-maintainers PTAL
